# Color vision medium cones

## Short Teaching Summary
Color vision medium cones: Our perception of the green color is attributed to M-cones (medium-type) being stimulated by light at a peak wavelength of approximately 534-545 nm (in the green region). Map connection: this idea links by example_of, requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
